allow: Bash(cmd /c "where node & where npm & where npx")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; Write-Host ''Downloading Node.js...''; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''https://nodejs.org/dist/v22.14.0/node-v22.14.0-x64.msi'' -OutFile ''C:\\Users\\update\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\node-installer.msi''; Write-Host ''Done''")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Process msiexec.exe -ArgumentList ''/i'', ''C:\\Users\\update\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\node-installer.msi'', ''/qn'', ''/norestart'', ''ADDLOCAL=ALL'' -Wait -Verb RunAs; Write-Host ''Install complete''")
Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '$env:PATH = ""C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;"" + $env:PATH; Set-Location ""C:\\Users\\update\\Desktop\\health report""; npm install 2>&1')
Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '$env:PATH = ""C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;"" + $env:PATH; Set-Location ""C:\\Users\\update\\Desktop\\health report""; npx astro check 2>&1')
Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '$env:PATH = ""C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;"" + $env:PATH; Set-Location ""C:\\Users\\update\\Desktop\\health report""; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1')
Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source")
Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Command vercel -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\Git\\mingw64\\bin\\git.exe'' config --global user.name; & ''C:\\Program Files\\Git\\mingw64\\bin\\git.exe'' config --global user.email")
